bodyHtml:
隔夜宏观概览

日期锚：2026-06-18 [来源：本机 系统日期锚 2026-06-18]。隔夜窗口以美股 2026-06-17 收盘和亚洲 2026-06-18 早盘可得报价为准 [来源：AP https://apnews.com/article/wall-street-stocks-dow-nasdaq-c5c1c0551c4fae25ef2c6bda73638e70 2026-06-17；来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18]。站立记忆里的“Fed: hawkish hold; cuts need labor/CRE/NIM break”继续成立；近期校正“freshness > availability”通过使用 2026-06-17 至 2026-06-18 的即时或当日来源执行 [来源：研究档案 2026-06-18]。研究档案 显示无开放委托 [来源：研究档案 2026-06-18]。

优先结论

  1. 隔夜核心不是衰退交易，而是“更高更久/甚至再加息”的再定价：FOMC 以 12-0 维持 3.50%-3.75% 区间，并在声明中强调通胀仍高于 2% 目标 [来源：Federal Reserve https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/monetary20260617a.htm 2026-06-17]。
  2. 美股下跌但亚洲早盘期货出现修复，说明风险资产在消化利率冲击，而非进入流动性失序；S&P 500 收跌 1.2%，但 S&P 500 期货早盘涨 0.40% [来源：AP https://apnews.com/article/wall-street-stocks-dow-nasdaq-c5c1c0551c4fae25ef2c6bda73638e70 2026-06-17；来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18]。
  3. 曲线熊平是今天亚洲资产的主线：2Y 美债在 4.187%，10Y 在 4.487%，10Y-2Y 利差约 31.32bp [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/rates-bonds/usa-government-bonds 2026-06-18]。
  4. 美元反弹压制亚洲 FX：DXY 约 100.37，EUR/USD 约 1.1502，USD/JPY 约 160.616，USD/CNH 约 6.78 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/united-states/currency 2026-06-17；来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/eurusd%3Acur 2026-06-17；来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/usdjpy%3Acur 2026-06-17；来源：Forbes https://www.forbes.com/advisor/money-transfer/currency-converter/usd-cnh/ 2026-06-17]。
  5. 油价回落降低输入型通胀尾部风险，但不足以重启宽松叙事；Brent 仍在 78.66 美元，WTI 在 76.24 美元 [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18]。

股指与期货

区域 指标 最新/收盘 涨跌 宏观解读
美国现货 S&P 500 7,420.10 [来源：AP https://apnews.com/article/wall-street-stocks-dow-nasdaq-c5c1c0551c4fae25ef2c6bda73638e70 2026-06-17] 91.25 / -1.2% [来源：AP https://apnews.com/article/wall-street-stocks-dow-nasdaq-c5c1c0551c4fae25ef2c6bda73638e70 2026-06-17] Fed 点阵偏鹰，长久期成长估值承压
美国现货 Nasdaq Composite 26,021.66 [来源：AP https://apnews.com/article/wall-street-stocks-dow-nasdaq-c5c1c0551c4fae25ef2c6bda73638e70 2026-06-17] 354.69 / -1.3% [来源：AP https://apnews.com/article/wall-street-stocks-dow-nasdaq-c5c1c0551c4fae25ef2c6bda73638e70 2026-06-17] AI 链仍要面对实际利率和电力成本约束
美国现货 Dow Jones 51,492.55 [来源：AP https://apnews.com/article/wall-street-stocks-dow-nasdaq-c5c1c0551c4fae25ef2c6bda73638e70 2026-06-17] 507.12 / -1.0% [来源：AP https://apnews.com/article/wall-street-stocks-dow-nasdaq-c5c1c0551c4fae25ef2c6bda73638e70 2026-06-17] 周期与金融未能抵消利率冲击
美国期货 S&P 500 Sep 26 7,522.75 [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] +30.00 / +0.40% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 亚洲早盘有技术性修复
美国期货 Nasdaq 100 Sep 26 30,217.00 [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] +218.25 / +0.73% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 隔夜杀估值后，科技期货反弹更强
欧洲现货 STOXX Europe 600 639.30 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/stoxx%3Aind 2026-06-17] +3.30 / +0.52% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/stoxx%3Aind 2026-06-17] 欧洲受油价回落支撑，但利率敏感板块分化
欧洲现货 DAX 24,934.67 [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/germany-30 2026-06-17] +24.26 / +0.10% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/germany-30 2026-06-17] 工业与出口链韧性仍在
欧洲现货 CAC 40 8,430.79 [来源：Morningstar https://www.morningstar.com.au/market/europe 2026-06-17] 16.48 / -0.20% [来源：Morningstar https://www.morningstar.com.au/market/europe 2026-06-17] 欧股内部已经转向相对防御
欧洲现货 FTSE 100 10,508.61 [来源：FT https://markets.ft.com/data/indices/tearsheet/summary?s=ftse%3Afsi 2026-06-17] +14.40 / +0.14% [来源：FT https://markets.ft.com/data/indices/tearsheet/summary?s=ftse%3Afsi 2026-06-17] 能源与防御股托底
亚太现货 Nikkei 225 69,902.25 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/japan/stock-market 2026-06-17] +0.72% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/japan/stock-market 2026-06-17] 日股仍受 AI/出口链支撑，但 JPY 160 附近增加干预风险
亚太现货 Hang Seng 24,312.16 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/hong-kong/stock-market 2026-06-17] 181.79 / -0.74% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/hong-kong/stock-market 2026-06-17] 中国资产更受美元和政策观望约束
亚太现货 Shanghai Composite 4,108.08 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/hong-kong/stock-market 2026-06-17] +16.18 / +0.40% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/hong-kong/stock-market 2026-06-17] 内需与政策预期仍提供缓冲
亚太现货 KOSPI 8,864.24 [来源：Yahoo Finance https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/ 2026-06-17] +137.64 / +1.58% [来源：Yahoo Finance https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/ 2026-06-17] 半导体 beta 仍强，但美元走强是逆风
亚太现货 ASX 200 8,966.30 [来源：MarketScreener https://www.marketscreener.com/stock-exchange/indexes/asia/ 2026-06-17] +0.54% [来源：MarketScreener https://www.marketscreener.com/stock-exchange/indexes/asia/ 2026-06-17] 商品与银行权重支撑

利率、美元与主要 FX

指标 最新 变化 含义
Fed funds 目标区间 3.50%-3.75% [来源：Federal Reserve https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/monetary20260617a.htm 2026-06-17] 维持不变，投票 12-0 [来源：Federal Reserve https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/monetary20260617a.htm 2026-06-17] 不是降息准备，而是鹰派暂停
2Y UST 4.187% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/rates-bonds/u.s.-2-year-bond-yield 2026-06-18] +0.023ppt [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/rates-bonds/u.s.-2-year-bond-yield 2026-06-18] 前端重新定价加息风险
5Y UST 4.264% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] +0.035ppt [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 中段受实际利率上行影响
10Y UST 4.487% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] +0.030ppt [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 长端上行但弱于前端，曲线趋平
30Y UST 4.929% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] +0.002ppt [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 长端通胀/期限溢价暂未失控
10Y-2Y 31.32bp [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] +4.15bp [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 曲线仍偏平，权益估值压力集中在成长股
DXY 100.3667 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/united-states/currency 2026-06-17] +0.83% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/united-states/currency 2026-06-17] 美元反弹压制亚洲 FX 与商品货币
EUR/USD 1.1502 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/eurusd%3Acur 2026-06-17] 0.92% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/eurusd%3Acur 2026-06-17] 欧元受美元和增长差压制
USD/JPY 160.616 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/usdjpy%3Acur 2026-06-17] +0.12% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/usdjpy%3Acur 2026-06-17] BOJ 加息后仍未扭转日元弱势
GBP/USD 1.3294 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/united-kingdom/currency 2026-06-17] 0.98% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/united-kingdom/currency 2026-06-17] 英镑对美元利差敏感
AUD/USD 0.7016 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/australia/currency 2026-06-17] 0.73% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/australia/currency 2026-06-17] 商品货币受强美元压制
USD/CNH 6.77907 [来源：Forbes https://www.forbes.com/advisor/money-transfer/currency-converter/usd-cnh/ 2026-06-17] 日内报价时间 19:34 UTC [来源：Forbes https://www.forbes.com/advisor/money-transfer/currency-converter/usd-cnh/ 2026-06-17] 人民币中间价与离岸价差需要盘中跟踪
USD/KRW 1,527.21 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/usdkrw%3Acur 2026-06-17] +1.17% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/usdkrw%3Acur 2026-06-17] 韩国权益强、汇率弱的组合需警惕外资对冲

大宗商品

品种 最新 涨跌 宏观含义
WTI 76.24 美元/桶 [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] +0.64 / +0.85% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 油价从冲突高位回落，但仍足以影响通胀预期
Brent 78.66 美元/桶 [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 0.30 / -0.38% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 海湾供应风险溢价降温
Gold 4,286.25 美元/盎司 [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] +10.05 / +0.24% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 强美元下仍有避险与央行买盘支撑
Copper 6.377 美元/磅 [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] +0.0137 / +0.22% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] AI 电力/电网需求支撑中期逻辑，短期受美元牵制

隔夜宏观与央行信号

事件 事实 资产含义
Fed 决议 FOMC 在 2026-06-17 以 12-0 维持 3.50%-3.75%，并称经济活动“solid”、通胀仍高于 2% 目标 [来源：Federal Reserve https://www.federalreserve.gov/newsevents/pressreleases/monetary20260617a.htm 2026-06-17] 降息押注被进一步挤出；短端利率和美元获得支撑
Fed SEP 2026 年 PCE 中位数 3.6%，core PCE 中位数 3.3%，2026 年联邦基金利率中位数 3.8% [来源：Federal Reserve https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomcprojtabl20260617.htm 2026-06-17] 通胀路径高于目标，政策反应函数偏防守
Fed 点阵分布 2026 年点阵中，3.625% 有 8 名、3.875% 有 3 名、4.125% 有 5 名、4.375% 有 1 名、3.375% 有 1 名 [来源：Federal Reserve https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomcprojtabl20260617.htm 2026-06-17] 委员会分歧不是“降息多少”，而是“是否加息”
BOJ BOJ 在 2026-06-16 以 7-1 决定把无担保隔夜拆借利率引导至约 1.0%，并将补充存款便利利率设为 1.0% [来源：Bank of Japan https://www.boj.or.jp/en/mopo/mpmdeci/mpr_2026/k260616a.pdf 2026-06-16] 日元未明显受益，说明美日利差和能源账单仍占主导
中国央行 Pan Gongsheng 在 2026-06-17 提到为境外货币当局设立人民币回购工具、上海自贸区试点离岸人民币外汇交易，并完善短端利率调控 [来源：WSJ 摘要 https://www.wsj.com/economy/central-banking/china-moves-to-boost-the-use-of-yuan-globally-edc2d7e1 2026-06-17] 人民币国际化偏制度建设，对今日权益的直接增量有限

今日亚洲交易含义

主题 观察点 操作含义
汇率 USD/JPY 160.616、USD/CNH 6.77907、USD/KRW 1,527.21 [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/usdjpy%3Acur 2026-06-17；来源：Forbes https://www.forbes.com/advisor/money-transfer/currency-converter/usd-cnh/ 2026-06-17；来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/usdkrw%3Acur 2026-06-17] 若美元延续强势，日韩与港股成长板块更容易跑输高股息/现金流板块
利率 2Y UST 4.187%、10Y UST 4.487% [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/rates-bonds/usa-government-bonds 2026-06-18] 亚洲久期资产不宜追高；关注中国长债是否受外部利率牵制
商品 Brent 78.66 美元、Gold 4,286.25 美元、Copper 6.377 美元 [来源：Investing.com https://www.investing.com/indices/indices-futures 2026-06-18] 油价回落利好输入成本，但金铜显示“避险+AI CAPEX”仍有资金
中国资产 Hang Seng -0.74%、Shanghai Composite +0.40% [来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/hong-kong/stock-market 2026-06-17] 港股更受美元和外资风险预算影响，A 股更依赖内生政策与红利风格
日本资产 BOJ 政策利率约 1.0%，Nikkei 225 +0.72% [来源：Bank of Japan https://www.boj.or.jp/en/mopo/mpmdeci/mpr_2026/k260616a.pdf 2026-06-16；来源：Trading Economics https://tradingeconomics.com/japan/stock-market 2026-06-17] 日股仍可强，但需把 FX 干预和进口成本作为尾部风险

跟踪事项

  • 亚洲盘重点跟踪 USD/JPY 是否逼近 162 [来源：MarketWatch 摘要 https://www.marketwatch.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-dow-set-to-rise-nasdaq-set-to-ease/card/bank-of-japan-s-rate-hike-does-little-to-boost-the-yen-DqSf4GPjO3MT3Iq3FMyA 2026-06-16]。
  • 观察 2Y UST 是否守在 4.15% 以上，若是，成长股反弹持续性较弱 [来源：MarketWatch 摘要 https://www.marketwatch.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-s-p-500-nasdaq-dow-federal-reserve-meeting-interest-rate-decision-14-point-plan/card/treasury-yields-move-sharply-higher-after-fed-signals-at-least-one-rate-hike-this-year-ZE31shFvSRcRm9m0NmVt 2026-06-17]。
  • 中国盘关注 PBOC 短端流动性操作是否把隔夜利率稳定在政策意图区间；若无新增宽松，红利与现金流仍优于高 beta。
